import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Trash2, ShoppingBag, X, ShieldCheck, ChevronRight, Info, Plus, Minus, Tag, Truck, CreditCard, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'; import { toast } from 'react-toastify'; const initialCart = [ { _id: '1', name: 'Premium Heavyweight Cotton Tee', brand: 'LANDLO', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521572163474-6864f9cf17ab?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800', price: 1499, mrp: 2499, qty: 1, size: 'M' }, { _id: '2', name: 'Slim Fit Dark Wash Jeans', brand: 'LEVIS', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542272604-787c3835535d?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=800', price: 2999, mrp: 3999, qty: 1, size: '32' }, ]; const Cart = () => { const [cartItems, setCartItems] = useState(initialCart); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { const timer = setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 800); return () => clearTimeout(timer); }, []); const updateQty = (id, delta) => { setCartItems(cartItems.map(item => item._id === id ? { ...item, qty: Math.max(1, item.qty + delta) } : item )); }; const removeFromCart = (id) => { setCartItems(cartItems.filter(item => item._id !== id)); toast.info('Removed from bag'); }; const subtotal = cartItems.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.price * item.qty, 0); const totalMrp = cartItems.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.mrp * item.qty, 0); const discountAmount = totalMrp - subtotal; const shipping = subtotal > 1500 ? 0 : 99; const total = subtotal + shipping; if (cartItems.length === 0) { return (

Empty Rotation

Your curation is currently looking a bit thin.
Add some essentials to get started.

BACK TO SHOP
); } return (

Your Curation - {cartItems.length} items

Free standard delivery on orders over Rs. 1500

{/* Left: Cart Items */}
{cartItems.map((item) => (

{item.brand}

New Season

{item.name}

Size {item.size}
{item.qty}
Rs. {item.price * item.qty} Rs. {item.mrp * item.qty}

You save Rs. {(item.mrp - item.price) * item.qty}

Ships in 24h
))}
{/* Guarantees */}

Secure Curation

256-bit SSL encrypted transactions

Multiple Options

UPI, Cards, & Pay Later Available

{/* Right: Price Breakdown */}
{/* Coupon Box */}
Exclusive Offers

Unlock Premium Rewards

{/* Price Details */}

Logistics & Totals

Base Curation Price Rs. {totalMrp}
Member Discount
-Rs. {discountAmount}
Shipping & Handling {shipping === 0 ? 'Complimentary' : `Rs. ${shipping}`}
Grand Total

Includes all taxes

Rs. {total}
+12k

Curated with over 12,000 fashionistas

{/* Mobile Sticky Bar - Only for very small screens if needed, otherwise rely on relative positioning */}
Total Rs. {total}
); }; export default Cart;

Order placed successfully!'); setTimeout(() => navigate('/order-success'), 1500); }; return (

))}
